# Provider Runtime / Adapter SSOT: Adapter ACL

Executable SSOT: [`adapter-acl.riido.json`](adapter-acl.riido.json).

This executable ontology owns the C4 adapter ACL surfaces that translate provider raw streams into daemon-neutral drafts and orchestrated runtime execution.

Canonical event append authority remains adjacent evidence owned by the EventIngestor contract.

## Executable Assertions

- Adapter ACL reader docs must be generated from this ontology.
- Provider adapters emit normalized drafts; EventIngestor owns canonical append authority.
- Bridge owns provider-neutral run composition and preserves DroppedArgs/TempFiles into the session boundary.
- Detect helper override paths are pins and fail closed instead of falling back to PATH.
- Instruction placement is provider-specific but verified through deterministic contract tests and opt-in real-provider probes.
